name: End-to-End Regression Flow
description: Full user journey covering launch → settings → model selection → inference → benchmark → new conversation. This is the comprehensive regression test for the @Observable refactor.

steps.description: Verify app launched and the main UI is visible (Model Hub tab on iOS).
Verify settings screen is visible with sampler controls.
Navigate back to the Models tab.
Select the first available model card to load it.
Wait for the model to finish loading (engine initialization).
Type a test prompt in the chat input field.
steps.value: What is 2+2? Answer with just the number.

steps.description: Tap the send/generate button to start inference.
Wait for inference to complete (generation finishes).
Verify that benchmark stats appeared after inference (TTFT and Decode speed).
Start a new conversation to verify clean state reset.
Verify the conversation was cleared — no chat bubbles, input is empty, ready for next prompt.
